---
title: R
description: |
  Research computing in &nbsp;[![](img/logo_r.png){width="1.5em"}](https://www.r-project.org/)
title-block-banner: true
---

<em><font color="#727474"><span style="font-size: 1.2rem;">Courses</span></font></em>

:::{layout="[[5, 5], [5, -5]]"}

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Getting started with &nbsp;![](img/logo_r.png){width="1.4em"}](top_intro.qmd){.card-title2 .stretched-link}

[An intro course on R]{.button-subtitle}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[![](img/logo_r.png){width="1.4em"} &nbsp;for the humanities](top_hss.qmd){.card-title2 .stretched-link}

[R course for HSS]{.button-subtitle}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[High-performance &nbsp;![](img/logo_r.png){width="1.4em"}](top_hpc.qmd){.card-title2 .stretched-link}

[A course on HPC in R]{.button-subtitle}

:::

:::

::::

<em><font color="#727474"><span style="font-size: 1.2rem;">Webinars</span></font></em>

:::{layout="[5, 5, -5, -5]"}

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[GIS mapping<br>with &nbsp;![](img/logo_r.png){width="1.4em"}](wb_gis_mapping.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[An intro to HPC in &nbsp;![](img/logo_r.png){width="1.4em"}](wb_hpc.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::

<em><font color="#727474"><span style="font-size: 1.2rem;">Workshops</span></font></em>

:::{layout="[5, 5, 5, 5]"}

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Web scraping with &nbsp;![](img/logo_rvest.png){width="1.0em"}](ws_webscraping.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[GIS mapping with &nbsp;![](img/logo_r.png){width="1.4em"}](ws_gis_intro.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Intro &nbsp;![](img/logo_r.png){width="1.4em"} &nbsp;for the humanities](ws_hss_intro.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[A little &nbsp;![](img/logo_r.png){width="1.4em"} &nbsp;demo](ws_demo.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::
